case_title: SIMMONS, VIANNA vs. THE SAN FRANCISCO CADILLAC BAR et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF INVOLUNTARY WITHDRAWAL OF PLTF'S ATTORNEY OF RECORD DUE TO SUSPENSION FROM PRACTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, VIANNA
CORRESPONDENCE RE: FAILURE OF ROBERT C. HUNTINGTON TO FILE A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY. FILED BY THIRD PARTY THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA
NOTARIZED COPY OF LETTER VERIFYING ADDRESS OF MS. VIANNA SIMMONS & COPY OF LETTER FROM GARY L. BRAVO M.D. RE: VERIFICATION OF HOSPITALIZATION.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WHITE, MATTHEW N SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR SIMMONS, VIANNA

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-08-1996, CONTINUED TO APR-17-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. APPEARANCE REQUIRED UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTIFIED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MARPLE, THOMAS DEAN SUBSTITUTED FOR MOUSHEGIAN, JAMES AS ATTORNEY FOR MORALES, LEON DOS LAREDOS, LTD. DBA CADILLAC BAR AND RESTAURANT
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED COX, TERENCE SHEEHAN (076142), ARB-5 MAILED
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION 1310C1200000 FOR COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-09-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-09-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY ROBERT HUNTINGTON IS ORDERED TO FILE THE APPROPRIATE SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FORM AND PROVIDE THE COURT WITH VIANNA SIMMONS CURRENT ADDRESS; NEW ATTORNEY OR PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED OR OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION TAKEN. HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, PER COURT ORDER OF 11-14-95; SEE MINUTES FOR DETAILS: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR HUNTINGTON, ROBERT COOK AS ATTORNEY FOR SIMMONS, VIANNA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, VIANNA SERVED MAR-04-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO CADILLAC BAR
SELECT PANEL OF ARBITRATORS, REJECTION DATE JUN-03-1996
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS & FEES
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK REDEEMED FOR TRANSACTION 1310C1200000 FOR COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-12-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-12-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED OSC: FOR COURT TO INVESTIGATE WHO IS REPRESENTING THE PLAINTIFF IN THIS ACTION, ETC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MALLON, PETER (124758) REJECTED BY PLAINTIFF

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-10-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-10-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR AUG-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF ROBERT HUNTINGTON RE: PLAINTIFF'S ABSENCE AT AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES REGARDING TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION HEARINGS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, VIANNA

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE COURT: 1. A DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY THAT PLTF HAS NEVER MOVED & NEVER LIVED AT 5565 PURDUE PLACE IN SAN JOSE. 2. A DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY RE: MEDICAL DOCUMENTATION SHOWING PLTF WAS HOSPITA- LIZED OR SERIOUSLY ILL. IF FAIL TO DO SO, COURT WILL DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-17-1996, CONTINUED TO MAY-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ANSWER OR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MORALES, LEON DOS LAREDOS, LTD. DBA CADILLAC BAR AND RESTAURANT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-08-1996, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON JUN-21-1996 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(C) APPEARANCE ON 5/8/96 IS WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CORRESPONDENCE RE: SETTLEMENT. LETTER DOES NOT REMOVE CASE FROM CALENDAR ONLY JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL DOES. RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, VIANNA

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, VIANNA AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO CADILLAC BAR MORALES, LEON DOS LAREDOS, LTD. DBA CADILLAC BAR AND RESTAURANT SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-10-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-09-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-20-1995

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-12-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-12-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FINAL OSC FOR PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER: CASE WILL BE DISMISSED IF VIANNA SIMMONS DOES NOT APPEAR. HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-14-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-14-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF VIANNA SIMMONS IS DIRECTED BY COURT TO BRING MEDICAL CERTIFICATE DESCRIBING MEDICAL WHAT MEDICAL CONDITION MIGHT EXCUSE HER TO APPEAR IN COURT AND THE DATES THEREIN. COURT ORDERS THAT PLTF'S ATTY. ROBERT HUNTINGTON BE REMOVED AS ATTY OR RECORD OF PLTF. AND THAT PLTF. BE SUBSTITUTED AS IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS HEREBY DISCHARGED. IF NO PROOF OF SERVICE AND NO GOOD CAUSE COURT MAY DISMISS THE CASE. HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, VIANNA SERVED MAR-04-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, LEON
PROPOSED ARBITRATOR SAUER, NORMAN AMBROSE (043865) REJECTED BY DEFENDANT
